creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
On Tue, Nov 27, 2001 at 12:40:17PM -0500, Will Andrews wrote:
> On Tue, Nov 27, 2001 at 06:35:33PM +0100, Anton Berezin wrote:
> > Yes for p5- ports which use ExtUtils::MakeMaker in their Makefile.PL
> > (the absolute majority do;  I only know one perl module collection which
> > does not, and it is not in the ports yet, and I co-authored it  :-)  ).
> 
> I assume it is pretty easy to convert any troublemakers to use
> ExtUtils::MakeMaker?

No.  If a module does not use MakeMaker, it must have a pretty good
reason to do so - this basically means that said module does everything
by itself, and most likely will either a) already be PREFIX-clean, or b)
have to be modified in non-trivial ways to become PREFIX-clean.  Let
this not concern you.  :-)

\Anton.
